meta.trainer: feedback-BPE (score-aware merge selection; en frozen at fert<=1.19)
meta.source: Wikipedia 'India' article (en, hi, te, kn), cleaned (whitespace collapsed)
meta.note_vocab: first 9744 merges of the 16764-token run (BPE prefix property: identical to training to 10k directly)

note: Byte-level BPE. vocab[i] is the token string in GPT-2 byte-char encoding; decoded[i] is its readable form. merges are applied in order.
